parameters.query: SELECT id, urn, name, type FROM linkedin_pages_monitored WHERE active = true;

=INSERT INTO linkedin_posts (id, page_db_id, author_urn, content, url, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  {{ $json.page_db_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.author_urn }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id)
DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content
RETURNING id;
